channel.title: UIC-STAT HPC – Tutorial of Research Computing
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial of Research Computing on UIC-STAT HPC

item.title: Services: Tutorial of Research Computing
item.description:
The tutorial is an sharing event organized by USBC, and all UIC students, faculty are welcome to attend. In general, the tutorial will share about the technique that can be used your daily usage of computer and USBC, usually focusing on:

  • Shell Tools, Scripting and Command-Linear Environment
  • Editors
  • Version Control (Git)
  • File System and Security

For more information, please contact bayes@uicstat.com
